name: GT-cstar-sa-to-epsjb
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-cstar-sa-to-epsjb (proofs/lem-cstar-sa-to-epsjb/, af: validated; status proved). CONTRACT: If F is a unital eta-idempotent UCP map on B(H) (||F^2-F||_cb <= eta < 1/4), Ftilde=theta(2F-1), and B=Im Ftilde carries the Choi-Effros product X*Y=Ftilde(XY) (Kitaev extended O(eta)-C*-algebra), then B_sa with the symmetrized product X∘Y=(1/2)(X*Y+Y*X) is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra with universal dimension-free constants. (Imported as a black-box validated lemma; no refs quote needed.)
